overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt of Rivia walking through the colorful Mediterranean-style city of Beauclair in the Toussaint region. The character crosses an ornate stone bridge, navigates through bustling Renaissance plazas with vibrant architecture, and enters narrow cobblestone alleyways on a bright sunny day.

events.description: horse rider passes by on the left side of the bridge

agents.ego_description: Geralt walks steadily across the stone bridge toward the city center, swords visible on his back

notable_agents.action: rider on brown horse trots past from left to right

entered.detail: ornate stone balustrade with decorative carvings running along the bridge edge
large stone statue of a robed figure with a bird perched on shoulder
grand red and white palace facade with multiple towers and arched windows
tall tower with clock face and spire rising above the palace
light-colored stone bridge surface with decorative patterns

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a wide stone bridge adorned with statues of robed figures. Geralt walks forward toward a distant red palace complex with clock towers under a bright blue sky. A horse rider passes by on the left, and the decorative stone pavement stretches ahead toward the city entrance.

scene_state.functional_zone: Renaissance city square with colorful facades

events.description: exits the bridge and enters the cobblestone city square
turns right toward the terrace overlooking the valley

agents.ego_description: Geralt enters the bustling city square, navigating between pedestrians and guards

notable_agents.action: guard in blue and silver armor standing watch near the terrace entrance

entered.detail: irregular cobblestone paving covering the town square
strings of yellow and orange pennant flags hanging across the square
decorative stone arch bridge connecting buildings across the street
bright yellow stucco building with shuttered windows

segments.scene_description: Geralt transitions from the bridge onto a cobblestone square surrounded by vibrant Renaissance buildings. The red palace now looms on the left while colorful banners stretch overhead. The character turns right toward a terrace area, passing a standing guard, as the crowd density increases with pedestrians in medieval attire.

events.description: passes an NPC painter working at an easel on the terrace

agents.ego_description: Geralt walks along the elevated terrace path, overlooking the scenic valley and mountains beyond

notable_agents.action: painter sitting at easel, painting the landscape view

entered.detail: low stone balustrade with rounded posts overlooking the valley
distant green mountains and valley visible beyond the city walls
wooden artist easel with canvas set up on the terrace
lush pink and purple flowering shrubs lining the path
gothic spires of a distant castle visible on the hillside

segments.scene_description: The character walks along an elevated terrace with a stone balustrade offering panoramic views of the green mountain valley. The path is lined with flowering bushes, and an NPC painter works at an easel capturing the scenery. The atmosphere shifts from urban square to scenic overlook with fewer crowds and more natural vegetation.

scene_state.functional_zone: lower town plaza with fountain and colorful facades

events.description: descends from terrace back into the lower plaza area
turns left around the fountain area

agents.ego_description: Geralt descends into the lower plaza, navigating around the central fountain and passing guards and townsfolk

notable_agents.action: armored guard standing near the terrace steps

entered.detail: circular stone fountain with sculpted figures in the plaza center
vibrant pink stucco building with white trim and arched doorways
bright blue painted building with shuttered windows
tall green cypress tree in a large terracotta planter
wooden wheeled cart parked on the cobblestones

segments.scene_description: Geralt descends from the terrace into a lively lower plaza featuring a central stone fountain. The area is surrounded by brightly colored buildings in pink, yellow, and blue. The character navigates around the fountain, passing guards and pedestrians, with potted trees and a wooden cart adding to the medieval marketplace atmosphere.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow cobblestone alleyway between tall buildings

events.description: enters the narrow shaded alleyway from the open plaza

agents.ego_description: Geralt walks into a narrow alleyway, passing between tall stone buildings with occasional pedestrians

notable_agents.action: child in blue clothing running ahead in the alley

entered.detail: tall weathered stone walls of adjacent buildings creating a narrow passage
decorative stone archway bridging the alley overhead
aged stone facade with climbing vines and weathered texture
heavy wooden door with iron studs set in the stone wall
simple wooden bench against the alley wall

segments.scene_description: The final segment transitions into a narrow, shaded alleyway with weathered stone walls and overhead archways. The lighting becomes more diffused as the sky is mostly blocked by the tall buildings. Geralt walks past a wooden bench and heavy wooden doors, following a child running ahead toward the distant light at the alley's end.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a grand city entrance into a bustling urban square and finally to a scenic mountain overlook. It begins on a wide stone bridge adorned with statues, moving forward toward a distant red palace complex under a bright blue sky as a horse rider passes by. As the camera crosses the bridge, the scene opens into a vibrant Renaissance square where colorful banners stretch overhead and the crowd density increases around the looming palace. The movement then shifts toward an elevated terrace, passing a standing guard and moving away from the urban bustle. Finally, the environment transforms into a quiet scenic overlook lined with flowering bushes and a painter at an easel, revealing panoramic views of a lush green mountain valley.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a vibrant, sun-drenched public plaza into the cool seclusion of a narrow city alley. It begins as Geralt descends from a terrace into a lively lower square, navigating around a central stone fountain amidst a backdrop of brightly colored pink, yellow, and blue buildings. As he passes through the marketplace atmosphere of potted trees, guards, and wooden carts, the open space gradually tightens. The scene then shifts into a shaded alleyway where the bright sunlight gives way to diffused light filtered through overhead archways and weathered stone walls. Finally, the camera follows Geralt past a wooden bench and heavy doors, trailing a running child toward the distant light at the alley's end.
